channel.title: Azure NetApp Files on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Azure NetApp Files on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Generally Available: Azure NetApp Files migration assistant
item.description:
Azure NetApp Files migration assistant is in preview and available generally, using SnapMirror for data migration to ANF. It supports migrations from on-premises systems and from CVO or other cloud providers.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure NetApp Files object REST API
item.description:
Azure NetApp Files Object REST API is now generally available. It provides an S3-compatible REST API for working with existing Azure NetApp Files data in cloud applications.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure NetApp Files cache volumes
item.description:
Azure NetApp Files cache volumes are now generally available. The feature adds cloud-based cache volumes that store only the most actively accessed data from an external origin volume.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Support for workloads with large files in Azure NetApp Files
item.description:
Azure NetApp Files now supports regular volumes with file sizes up to 64 TiB. This is intended for workloads that use large files, including Azure VMware Solution virtual machines with large VMDK disks.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure NetApp Files enable backup by default
item.description:
Azure NetApp Files now enables backup by default for newly created volumes in public preview. Backups are provisioned automatically at volume creation to simplify setup and improve data protection.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Generally Available: Azure NetApp Files advanced ransomware protection
item.description:
Azure NetApp Files advanced ransomware protection (ANF ARP) is now generally available. It is intended to help detect, respond to, and recover from ransomware threats on cloud volumes.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Generally Available: User and group quota reports in Azure NetApp Files
item.description:
Azure NetApp Files now includes user and group quota reporting in preview/GA update. The feature provides visibility into quota limits and usage for NFS, SMB, and dual-protocol volumes.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In development] Public Preview: Azure NetApp Files storage with cool access enhancement
item.description:
Azure NetApp Files adds a QoS update for cool access on Premium and Ultra service levels. Throughput now adjusts automatically as data moves to cool storage, helping balance performance and cost for mixed hot and cool workloads.

  • Source: Azure Updates
